title: Site-Directed Mutagenesis
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4tmjk","text":"In order to consider an assay “validated” for a gene it must be able to distinguish between WT-like variants and NULL-like variants consistently and reliably, and preferably in a pooled format. This protocol outlines how to generate variants selected that are known to cause disease (clinically annotated pathogenic or dysfunctional), or to otherwise have a disruptive effect on protein structure or gene function, and a few variants that are known to not have an effect (i.e. clinically annotated benign or behave like the WT gene).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

C2987I)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":22,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9jh16","text":"Gateway LR Clonase II Enzyme mix (ThermoFisher Scientific: 11791020)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"lgnr","text":"LB Broth (Millipore Sigma: 51208)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ef128","text":"Spectinomycin (Millipore Sigma: S0692)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"tlvs","text":"Ampicillin (Millipore Sigma: A5354)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dcfhg","text":"1 kb Plus DNA Ladder (NEB: N3200S)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dugfo","text":"Agarose (Millipore Sigma: A9539)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6dc6j","text":"Agar (Millipore Sigma: A6686)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"32ofq","text":"Cell Culture Dishes (ThermoFisher Scientific: 150460)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1i5n1","text":"QIAprep Spin Miniprep Kit (Qiagen: 27104)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"df1ca","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Site-Directed Mutagenesis PCR Approach 'Around the World' PCR Approach to mutagenesis Design and order 5’-phosphorylated primers: Forward primer – 25 bp length: 12 bp on either side of mutation Reverse primer – 25 bp immediately upstream (copy reverse) and shorten to Tm of 65℃ down to 18 bp using https://tmcalculator.neb.com Dilute 100 μM primer stocks to 10 μM with PCR water. Dilute the template plasmid with gene/protein of interest to 1 ng/μL. Perform PCR: %s %s Thermocycler setting: %s %s Check 5μL of PCR product on a 1% agarose gel. Treat 5 μL of DNA with 1μL of DpnI and incubate at 37℃ for 15 min.
Ligation Reaction %s %s Incubate ligation mix at 25℃ for 5 min and chill on ice or store at -20℃.

Small Scale Transformation Thaw 1 tube of NEB 5 chemical competent E. coli cells (each contains 200μl cells) for ~6 min Add 1μl Ligation product directly to 10μl of competent cells Incubate cells on ice for 30 min. Heat shock cells for 30 sec at 42°C in a H 2 O bath. Incubate cells on ice for 5 min. For each tube, recover 11μl cells in 90μl of SOC Outgrowth Medium in an eppendorf tube under rotation at 37°C for 1 hour. Plate entire culture on petri plates (LB + 50μg/ml spectinomycin) Incubate the plates at 37°C overnight. Isolate 2 colonies from each plate and inoculate in selective media (LB + 50μg/ml spectinomycin) Incubate under rotation at 37°C overnight. Mini-prep using QIAprep Spin Miniprep Kit Send for Sanger/Plasmidsaurus sequencing.
Gateway LR Reaction %s %s Mix well by vortexing briefly and incubate at 25°C overnight(leave on the bench at room temperature)

Small Scale LR Transformation Transform LR reactions into chemical competent E. coli cells as follows: Thaw 1 tube of NEB 5 chemical competent E. coli cells (each contains 200μl cells) for ~6 min Add 1μl LR reaction directly to 10μl of competent cells Incubate cells on ice for 30 min. Heat shock cells for 30 sec at 42°C in a H 2 O bath. Incubate cells on ice for 5 min. For each tube, recover 11μl cells in 90μl of SOC Outgrowth Medium in an eppendorf tube under rotation at 37°C for 1 hour. Plate entire culture on petri plates (LB + 100 μg/ml ampicillin) Incubate the plates at 37°C overnight. Isolate 2 colonies from each plate and inoculate in selective media (LB + 100 μg/ml ampicillin) Incubate under rotation at 37°C overnight. Mini-prep using QIAprep Spin Miniprep Kit BR Qubit to obtain concentration.
creator: Warren van Loggerenberg
